title: Policy Registry Setting
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge — the finale. Lock down the desktop through Group Policy. On the `Desktop Lockdown` GPO, set a registry value that disables the registry editor: key `HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System`, value name `DisableRegistryTools`, type `DWord`, value `1`.
objectives: Specify the key, value name, and DWord type
hints: Set-GPRegistryValue writes a registry-based policy setting into a GPO.

files.content:
# TODO: push a registry-based restriction into the lockdown policy to block a built-in tool
Set-GPRegistryValue -Name "Desktop Lockdown"
